blockingIssues.description: The authoritative terminology artifact .factory/library/review-contract-freeze.md is corrupted by control characters, so canonical field names are not copy-safe or machine-readable.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update review-contract-worker to require a final raw-file sanity check of generated .factory/library markdown artifacts for encoding/control-character corruption before completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The M1 contract-freeze feature committed malformed identifiers in .factory/library/review-contract-freeze.md while the worker handoff still reported the terminology table as authored successfully.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a general AGENTS.md rule for all markdown files
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous; the evidence specifically points to contract-worker output validation rather than a repo-wide markdown policy gap
